diff: The allocations specified in [A.2.3.1.4.1.1 - Allocation To Core Council Buffer](c46c7059-4ec1-4966-8382-d9e2e851d616) and [A.2.3.1.4.1.2 - Allocation To Aligned Delegates Buffer](2a9bcfb1-4dad-4baf-a09a-e9264b3d17bb) are effective retroactive to September 1, 2025. The October 30, 2025 Executive Vote included these allocations for the period from September 1, 2025 to September 30, 2025. The amounts transferred were 3,876,387 USDS to the Core Council Buffer and 193,820 USDS to the Aligned Delegates Buffer.
description: Do not merge until poll passes

diff: The allocations specified in [A.2.3.1.4.1.1 - Allocation To Core Council Buffer](c46c7059-4ec1-4966-8382-d9e2e851d616) and [A.2.3.1.4.1.2 - Allocation To Aligned Delegates Buffer](2a9bcfb1-4dad-4baf-a09a-e9264b3d17bb) are effective retroactive to September 1, 2025. The October 30, 2025 Executive Vote included these allocations for the period from September 1, 2025 to September 30, 2025. The amounts transferred were 3,876,387 USDS to the Core Council Buffer and 193,820 USDS to the Aligned Delegates Buffer.
